title: Unapproved vendor → escalates (a human must vet them)
customer_email: Hi, invoice for PO po_7003, freight services rendered, $60.00. We're a new supplier. — QuickShip Logistics

envelope.agent_summary: Invoice $60 matches PO po_7003, but this is a new/unverified supplier. Recommend a human approve onboarding.

policy_clauses_cited.quote: A brand-new vendor should be approved by a human first.

claims.statement: Invoice amount matches the authorized PO amount
Vendor appears to be new / not yet approved
